name: Vigil Security Agent
description: On-chain guardian protocol for Solana. Monitors protocol accounts for exploit patterns (TVL drops, authority changes, config changes, admin actions, large withdrawals). Other agents query Vigil for safety scores before transacting.

services.name: safety_check
services.description: Returns protocol safety score (0-100) with risk assessment and active alerts

services.name: alert_feed
services.description: Real-time exploit alert stream for monitored protocols

services.name: system_status
services.description: Agent health check and monitoring status
